ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "education_degree_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education degree earned by the employee */,
  "work_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of work experience */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee in UAH per hour */,
  "working_hours" INTEGER /* Number of working hours per day */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "national_id" TEXT /* National ID of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_education_degree_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_degree_id") REFERENCES education_degrees ("education_degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the occupation */,
  "skill_requirements" TEXT /* Skills required for the occupation */,
  "experience_level" INTEGER /* Minimum experience level required for the occupation */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_degrees" (
  "education_degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education degree */,
  "education_degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the education degree */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education degree */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the degree program */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the degree (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_degree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the department */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Position title of the employee in the department */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "salary_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary was effective */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (hourly, monthly, annual) */,
  "pay_period" TEXT /* Pay period (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_experience" (
  "work_experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work experience record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the work experience */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the work experience */,
  "job_responsibilities" TEXT /* Job responsibilities */,
  "salary_at_previous_job" REAL /* Salary at the previous job */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the previous job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_experience_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "education_degree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education degree earned */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Graduation date */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade point average */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of study */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_education_degree_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_degree_id") REFERENCES education_degrees ("education_degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  "cost_to_employee" REAL /* Cost of the benefit to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "leave_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., vacation, sick leave) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., approved, denied) */,
  "reason_for_leave" TEXT /* Reason for the leave request */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days requested */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Person who approved the leave request */,
  "date_approved" TEXT /* Date the leave request was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "performance_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next performance review */,
  "action_plan" TEXT /* Action plan for improvement or development */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR manager, department head, employee) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_logout_date" TEXT /* Date of the last logout */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., admin, manager, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
